title: moraea ochroleuca
intro: Moraea ochroleuca, also known as the yellow-flowered Moraea, is a species of flowering plant in the iris family. The plant is used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Moraea ochroleuca include its ability to treat various ailments, such as fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions. The plant is typically prepared as an infusion or decoction, and it may also be used in the form of a poultice or ointment to aid in the treatment of wounds and skin infections.
